series_metadata.series_description: Annual report of spirituous liquor dollar sales by county. (fna PD-08)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for 1 year, then destroy, provided Auditor of State has completed audit and the audit report has been released. ; Electronic: Retain back-up tape cartridge for 5 years, then destroy by reusing tape., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
